title: TCW Launcher 0.3.6 Beta
summary: Profile layout polish and marketplace coming-soon lockout.
notes: Moves the compact launcher profile card higher above the server heading and keeps the expanded military record view scroll-safe inside the player window.
Greys out the Store entry until approved marketplace items are live, avoiding the empty marketplace view.
Keeps server browser/menu visibility fixes and current backend-fed profile, audio, theme, community, and achievement systems.
